mnemonics: G.R.E.E.N. IT: G-reen R-esources E-fficiency E-waste N-eutrality
keyPoints: The primary goal is to reduce the environmental impact of IT systems.
Focus areas include energy-efficient hardware, optimized software, and proper e-waste disposal.
Sustainability in IT is about balancing environmental responsibility with business needs.
commonMistakes: Focusing only on energy consumption and ignoring the full lifecycle (manufacturing, disposal).
Assuming that moving to the cloud automatically reduces environmental impact; it depends on the provider's energy sources.
